_comment: Example config for cmd/automation-worker. JSON does not support comments, so _comment fields are documentation and are ignored by the Go loader.

nats._comment: The automation worker consumes automation.run.requested and publishes automation.run.started plus automation.run.review_required.

sqlite._comment: SQLite database file containing approved application packets and automation run state.

consumer._comment: Durable pull consumer settings for automation.run.requested.

automation._comment: packet-only prepares an approved packet and stops at user review. ATS adapters prepare review-only assisted filling plans; final submission remains blocked.

browser._comment: Set enabled=true or mode=assisted-browser to launch an assisted browser session and write a review handoff JSON file. Use args with {url} as the application URL placeholder. The worker still stops before final submission.
